system.description:
Play the Shock Trooper to be a mobile tank that can use Adrenaline to push beyond their limits. Gain access to the Bone domain.

Foundation Features

Stay Cool: When you would mark Stress, you may spend any amount of Adrenaline to mark one less per 2 Adrenaline spent.

Ready: When you gain the spotlight with less than 2 Adrenaline, set your Adrenaline to 2.

Specialization Features

Quick Reflexes: When you are targeted by an attack, spend any amount of Adrenaline to gain an equal bonus to your Evasion against that attack. If that causes the attack to fail, clear a Shield Slot.

Stoked: When you gain the spotlight with less than 3 Adrenaline, set your Adrenaline to 3.

Mastery Features

Tactical Reposition: Once per long rest, if you would mark any amount of Hit Points, you can mark that much Stress instead and immediately move a Close range.

Pumped Up: When you gain the spotlight with less than 4 Adrenaline, set your Adrenaline to 4. Your Adrenaline die becomes a d10.
